markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define the partnership scope, pricing, and process for Turing's content needs.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Phased Rollout:** The partnership will start with Turing Intelligence (TI) editorial content, then expand to TA2 within \~60 days. This timeline addresses leadership's focus on TI (enterprise pipeline) while also addressing TA2 (70-80% of engagements).](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [**TA2 Strategy:** For TA2, the initial focus is filling SEO gaps with "how-to" guides (e.g., "How to use a REST API to build X"), not basic definitions. This strategy aims to shift Turing's search identity from staff augmentation to AI labs expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [**Pricing:** A $40k strategy sprint (8 weeks) includes 5-10 articles, followed by a 12-month execution phase at $15k/month for 5 articles/week. Turing can opt out after the sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [**Quality Mandate:** All content must be high-value and multi-purpose, not just SEO-optimized, to satisfy a leadership mandate from Phil.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)

## Topics

### The Challenge: Balancing Two Distinct Business Units

[Turing has two business units with different content needs:](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

  - [**Turing Intelligence (TI):** Enterprise-focused, building proprietary AI apps for clients like Pepsi.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
      - [**Goal:** Generate enterprise pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [**Content:** Verticalized use cases (e.g., "AI for financial reporting").](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [**TA2 (AI Labs):** Sells to top AI labs (e.g., OpenAI) to improve their models.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
      - [**Goal:** Win 100% of business in key horizontals (e.g., coding, RL environments).](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Account penetration varies (e.g., 30% at OpenAI vs. 10% at Amazon), creating a need for content that drives expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)

### The Solution: A Phased Content Strategy

  - [**Phase 1: Turing Intelligence (TI) Focus**](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [**Rationale:** TI is an easier starting point and leadership's top priority for pipeline generation.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [**Output:** 5 articles/week (new + refresh), with a focus on verticalized use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [**Phase 2: TA2 (AI Labs) Expansion**](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Begin TA2 work within \~60 days of kickoff to address leadership's focus on this 70-80% of engagements.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
      - [**Initial Scope:** Fill SEO gaps with "how-to" guides (e.g., "How to use a REST API to build X").](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
      - [**Long-Term Scope:** Create derivative articles from existing case studies (e.g., a Salesforce AI project) to drive traffic to core assets.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)

### The Mandate: High-Quality, Multi-Purpose Content

  - [**Requirement:** All content must be high-value and multi-purpose, not just SEO-optimized.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=2092.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This mandate from Phil ensures content can be repurposed for other uses (e.g., sales enablement) to demonstrate clear ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=2092.0)
  - [**Action:** Turing will provide 3-5 examples of desired quality to set a clear benchmark.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)

### The Partnership Framework

  - [**Pricing:**](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (Strategy Sprint):** $40,000 for 8 weeks, including 5-10 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Execution):** $15,000/month for 12 months, delivering 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
      - [**Opt-Out:** Turing can cancel after Phase 1.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
      - [**Review:** Bailey (TA2) and Nathan (TI) are primary reviewers, using Google Docs and Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
      - [**Reporting:** A Looker dashboard will track metrics (clicks, impressions, conversions) and GEO performance (using Scrunch).](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=2274.0)
  - [**Onboarding:** Turing will provide existing brand, product, and sales materials to accelerate growthx's ramp-up.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1940.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Send the Statement of Work (SoW) to Weston.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=2430.0)
  - [**Weston:** Review the SoW and initiate internal procurement discussions.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=2066.0)
  - [**Nathan:** Share 3-5 examples of the desired content quality to set a benchmark.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=2086.0)
  - [**Bailey:** Compile existing brand, product, and sales materials for onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/XEbisyzR7jYUTafxZyNmkuuUGCdFaQG7?tab=summary&timestamp=1940.0)
